notableEvents.label: Leo Rivas plunked
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Leo Rivas hit by pitch. Connor Joe to 3rd. J.P. Crawford to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley lines out to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Wyatt Langford GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wyatt Langford grounds into a double play, third baseman Leo Rivas to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Connor Joe. Brandon Nimmo out at 2nd. Wyatt Langford out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson hit by pitch. Corey Seager to 3rd. Wyatt Langford to 2nd.
